name: A Shadow Over Paper School - FPE AU
description:
Abandoned By God.

The once populated hallways tell tales of an educational facility once inhabited by young, bright minds with big aspirations for the future.

You are an Urban Explorer with a superstitious background, and you have taken up the job of investigating the most disturbed building in the world.
